title: croton helichrysum
intro: Croton helichrysum, also known as Croton lechleri or Dragon's Blood tree, is a plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its distinctive red sap and unique, elliptical-shaped leaves. The medicinal properties of Croton helichrysum are attributed to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and pain, promoting wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a potential treatment for skin conditions and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Croton helichrysum is often used in the form of tinctures, capsules, or topical creams, and can also be consumed as a tea.
